data.content: Reverted all mainline settings restyle commits associated with knot 0df2, backing out the repeated purple/green redesign passes and restoring the pre-0df2 settings presentation. Verified with bun run lint (warnings only, 0 errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed directly to origin/main as commits 3b9c5d7, 005ce9f, and 311716c.
